☆ Wanna know about me…?~ ☆

Twenty-two years ago, before Silver Rosehart was even born, I existed first… I. EXISTED. FIRST. I was the only one supposed to be born from the womb of my mother. Yet, I am FORCED to live like a goddamn parasite deep within his head. While Silver grew into a normal child, I remained aware quietly… observantly… waiting for the right moment to wake.

When I and Silver reached the age of eighteen, the first signs of me began to surface. Not because I wanted to but because, Silver felt danger, and those moments allowed me to take control. As I opened my eyes, I found myself being beaten up by someone. Seems like Silver’s stupid ass got into this situation… While I was getting beaten up, the first thought that came into my mind is to get out of this situation.
